/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -Os -g -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,libns3.45-netsimulyzer-test-default.so -o /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-netsimulyzer-test-default.so "CMakeFiles/netsimulyzer-test.dir/test/test-buildings.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/netsimulyzer-test.dir/test/test-node-events.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/netsimulyzer-test.dir/test/test-orchestrator-outputs.cc.o"   -L/home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib -Wl,--no-as-needed /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-netsimulyzer-default.so /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-buildings-default.so /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-point-to-point-default.so /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-applications-default.so -Wl,--as-needed /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-propagation-default.so /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-mobility-default.so /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-antenna-default.so /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-internet-default.so /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-bridge-default.so /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-traffic-control-default.so /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-network-default.so /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-stats-default.so /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-core-default.so -Wl,--no-as-needed -Wl,--as-needed
